_comment: Unity Editor MCP Integration — Astra SuperChain AI Agent
_instructions: 1. Start the MCP server in HTTP mode: python -m mcp_server --transport http --port 8080
2. In Unity Editor, use UnityWebRequest or REST client to call the MCP endpoint
4. All tool calls use POST with JSON body: {"method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "tool_name", "arguments": {...}}}
5. Install 'Unity MCP Client' package or use the C# helper class below

game_dev.description: Generate Unity project scaffold with best-practice structure

ai_chat.description: Chat with Astra AI for game design, scripting, and debugging help

code_review.description: Analyze C# scripts for vulnerabilities and quality

generate_tests.description: Auto-generate xUnit tests for Unity C# scripts

refactor.description: Refactor C# code with SOLID principles

deep_think.description: Multi-iteration reasoning for complex game design problems

csharp_helper: See backend/docs/unity_mcp_client.cs for the C# MCP client helper class
